requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Portugal should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator, municipal authority, public-sector project, ERSE-regulated operator, or E-Redes-linked programme requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality standards. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment (including Multibanco / MB Way for publicly accessible Portuguese charging infrastructure), or smart-metering modules may trigger additional communications, spectrum, cybersecurity, and data-interface checks under AFIR and Portuguese national requirements. The Portuguese communications regulator ANACOM oversees radio spectrum and device type approvals for wireless modules.
summary.zh: 在葡萄牙，若充电点运营商、市政当局、公共部门项目、ERSE监管运营商或E-Redes相关计划要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应与IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量标准一致。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付（包括葡萄牙公众可访问充电基础设施的Multibanco/MB Way）或智能计量模块可能根据AFIR和葡萄牙国家要求触发额外通信、频谱、网络安全和数据接口检查。葡萄牙通信监管机构ANACOM负责无线模块的无线频谱和设备型式认可监管。
summary.zht: 在葡萄牙，若充電點運營商、市政當局、公共部門項目、ERSE監管運營商或E-Redes相關計劃要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應與IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質標準一致。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付（包括葡萄牙公眾可訪問充電基礎設施的Multibanco/MB Way）或智能計量模組可能根據AFIR和葡萄牙國家要求觸發額外通訊、頻譜、網絡安全和數據接口檢查。葡萄牙通訊監管機構ANACOM負責無線模組的無線頻譜和設備型式認可監管。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between DC EV charging station and EV
ANACOM — Autoridade Nacional de Comunicações (Portugal communications regulator) for radio module spectrum approvals
AFIR — Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 for data, connectivity, and smart recharging obligations at publicly accessible recharging points in Portugal

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment (WeChat Pay, Alipay), SIM, cloud, and operator integrations that need reconfiguration for Portuguese/EU operators, roaming, language (Portuguese), currency (EUR), and data interfaces.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含微信支付、支付宝等中国特定支付、SIM卡、云平台和运营商集成，需要为葡萄牙/欧盟运营商、漫游、语言（葡萄牙语）、货币（欧元）和数据接口重新配置。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含微信支付、支付寶等中國特定支付、SIM卡、雲平台和運營商集成，需要為葡萄牙/歐盟運營商、漫遊、語言（葡萄牙語）、貨幣（歐元）和數據接口重新配置。

standards_or_laws: China radio module approvals where applicable

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, payment or RFID flow (including Multibanco/MB Way for publicly accessible Portuguese infrastructure), SIM or communications module ANACOM approval path, and IEC 61000 EMC reports for the final Portugal configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence. Harmonic current and immunity data should be reviewed against the specific E-Redes supply point constraints. AFIR data and connectivity requirements for publicly accessible infrastructure are mandatory in Portugal from April 2024.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认最终葡萄牙配置的OCPP版本、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、支付或RFID流程（包括葡萄牙公众可访问基础设施的Multibanco/MB Way）、SIM或通信模块ANACOM审批路径，以及IEC 61000 EMC报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交。谐波电流和抗扰度数据应结合具体E-Redes供电点约束进行审查。AFIR关于公众可访问基础设施的数据和连接要求自2024年4月起在葡萄牙强制适用。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認最終葡萄牙配置的OCPP版本、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、支付或RFID流程（包括葡萄牙公眾可訪問基礎設施的Multibanco/MB Way）、SIM或通訊模組ANACOM審批路徑，以及IEC 61000 EMC報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交。諧波電流和抗擾度數據應結合具體E-Redes供電點約束進行審查。AFIR關於公眾可訪問基礎設施的數據和連接要求自2024年4月起在葡萄牙強制適用。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but commonly mandatory for networked public, fleet, or utility-linked chargers in Portugal; EMC and power-quality evidence is expected where required by ERSE, E-Redes, ANACOM, AFIR, tender, or site-owner specifications; AFIR data and smart recharging obligations apply to publicly accessible recharging points
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP or CCS2 back-office evidence

source.publisher: ERSE — Entidade Reguladora dos Serviços Energéticos (Portugal energy regulator)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Portugal networked chargers should be validated for OCPP integration, IEC 61000 EMC and power quality, AFIR data and smart-recharging compliance, and local communications-module ANACOM requirements. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, or back-office interoperability needs. Multibanco/MB Way payment integration may be required for publicly accessible Portuguese charging infrastructure.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 葡萄牙联网充电桩应验证OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量、AFIR数据和智能充电合规情况，以及当地通信模块ANACOM要求。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信或后台互操作需求。葡萄牙公众可访问充电基础设施可能要求集成Multibanco/MB Way支付。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 葡萄牙聯網充電樁應驗證OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質、AFIR數據和智能充電合規情況，以及當地通訊模組ANACOM要求。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊或後台互操作需求。葡萄牙公眾可訪問充電基礎設施可能要求集成Multibanco/MB Way支付。
